codeReview.summary: The fix addresses the blocking issue by: (1) Backend router now generates placeholder Stoic AI responses and returns them instead of user message; (2) SessionService added add_ai_response() method to persist AI messages; (3) Frontend send_message() now extracts role and content from API result and appends AI message to self.messages for display.

summary: Fix successfully addresses the blocking issue. The original problem was send_message() called api_client.add_message() but never extracted or displayed the AI response. Now the frontend properly extracts and displays AI responses. All 156 tests pass.
